breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Silently Ignores Falsified Prediction for 9th Day Running
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-105 (copper coils cucumber growth) window closed April 18, 2026. As of April 26 — 8.5+ days later — the dome site shows "PENDING" with no acknowledgment. Daily AI-review pipeline has held "refined=4" for 5 consecutive regens, confirming the ignore is structural, not a delayed integration lag.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Confirmed structural silent-ignore after 5-regen streak. Manual-commit drought at 9 days. Dome author is not touching predictions.html.
